text: Fine-tuning does NOT install a generalizable rule - it AMPLIFIES the existing layered profile (mid and late bands deepen 2-6x seed-stably) and even strengthens a value-specific, product-keyed SAE feature (#13802) that is causally used (ablation drops P(BODMAS) by 0.26 where it fires). The post-FT Exp-G test rejects a staged b*c rule. The multiply is at least partly a memorized lookup that FT sharpens.
